ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sales_transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales transaction */,
  "invoice_number" INTEGER /* Invoice number for the transaction */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who made the purchase */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the transaction */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* Country where the transaction occurred */,
  "total_quantity" INTEGER /* Total quantity of items sold in the transaction */,
  "total_revenue" REAL /* Total revenue generated from the transaction */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment used for the transaction */,
  "shipping_method" TEXT /* Method of shipping used for the transaction */,
  "shipping_cost" REAL /* Cost of shipping for the transaction */,
  "tax_amount" REAL /* Tax amount charged on the transaction */,
  "discount_amount" REAL /* Discount amount applied to the transaction */,
  "store_id" TEXT /* Identifier for the store where the transaction occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_transactions_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_transactions_country_code FOREIGN KEY ("country_code") REFERENCES countries ("country_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_details" (
  "detail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction detail */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sales transaction */,
  "stock_code" TEXT /* Stock code of the item sold */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item sold */,
  "price" REAL /* Price per unit of the item */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Total revenue generated from the item in the transaction */,
  "discounted_price" REAL /* Price of the item after discounts */,
  "tax_amount" REAL /* Tax amount for the specific item */,
  "shipping_cost" REAL /* Shipping cost for the specific item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("detail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_details_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES sales_transactions ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_details_stock_code FOREIGN KEY ("stock_code") REFERENCES inventory ("stock_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the customer */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Street address of the customer */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the customer */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the customer */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the customer */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* Country code of the customer */,
  "loyalty_points" INTEGER /* Loyalty points accumulated by the customer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer */,
  "membership_date" TEXT /* Date the customer joined the loyalty program */,
  "last_purchase_date" TEXT /* Date of the customer's last purchase */,
  "total_spend" REAL /* Total amount spent by the customer */,
  "referral_code" TEXT /* Referral code used by the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "stock_code" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product category */,
  "sub_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product subcategory */,
  "stock_level" INTEGER /* Current stock level of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price per unit of the product */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time the inventory was last updated */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the supplier of the product */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Threshold for automatic reordering */,
  "lead_time" INTEGER /* Lead time for reordering */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the product */,
  "dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions of the product */,
  "warranty_period" TEXT /* Warranty period of the product */,
  "supplier_price" REAL /* Price paid to the supplier for the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_sub_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("sub_category_id") REFERENCES sub_categories ("sub_category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent category (for nested categories) */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the category image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sub_categories" (
  "sub_category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subcategory */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent category */,
  "sub_category_name" TEXT /* Name of the subcategory */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the subcategory */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the subcategory image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sub_category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sub_categories_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_code" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "currency_code" TEXT /* Currency code for the country */,
  "tax_rate" REAL /* Tax rate applicable in the country */,
  "shipping_zones" TEXT /* Shipping zones within the country */,
  "currency_symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the currency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, manager, staff) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
